examples: A calabash is a light-green vine fruit, also known as opo squash or long melon.
Tatenda Majiri, 22, hoists a calabash of home-brewed beer with some authority while discussing news of the day.
Made from: calabash, twine, wire, and so on.
Percussion instruments range from the balafon (marimba) to the calabash, but the celebrity drum is the djembe.
The instrument has calabash gourd resonators of varying sizes, arranged beneath the frame proportionally to the keys.
